Rule: Rejected from Queue results in R label in AIP
Test Case: TC-01 - Rejected from Queue shows R in AIP
Preconditions: User has an application currently visible in queue and staff rejects it.
Action: Reject the application from Queue
Open Applications in Progress (AIP)
Expected Result: Rejected application is present in AIP

Action: Check application status label in AIP

Rule: Rejected then submitted to AIR reflects claim state as PR or IR
Test Case: TC-02 - Rejected then submitted to AIR shows PR when unclaimed
Preconditions: A rejected application exists and is submitted to Applications in Review (AIR). No staff user has claimed it.
Action: Submit the rejected application to AIR
Open Applications in Review (AIR)
Check application review status in AIR
Expected Result: Status is PR (Pending Review) when not claimed

Rule: Rejected then submitted to AIR reflects claim state as PR or IR
Test Case: TC-03 - Rejected then submitted to AIR shows IR when claimed
Preconditions: A rejected application exists and is submitted to Applications in Review (AIR). Staff user claims the application.
Action: Submit the rejected application to AIR
Claim the application in AIR
Expected Result: Application is assigned to the staff user

Action: Check application review status in AIR
Expected Result: Status is IR (In Review) when claimed

Rule: Rejected in AIR withdrawn back to AIP keeps R label
Test Case: TC-04 - Rejected in AIR withdrawn to AIP shows R
Preconditions: A rejected application exists in Applications in Review (AIR).
Action: Withdraw the rejected application from AIR back to AIP
Expected Result: Application is moved to Applications in Progress (AIP)

Action: Open Applications in Progress (AIP)
Expected Result: Withdrawn application is listed in AIP

Action: Check application status label in AIP

Rule: Rejected then approved to cart then removed from cart keeps rejection history but not R in AIP
Test Case: TC-05 - Approved to cart then removed from cart keeps history and does not show R in AIP
Preconditions: Application previously had rejection history and was later approved into cart.
Action: Remove the approved application from cart
Open rejection history for the application
Open Applications in Progress (AIP)
Expected Result: Application is present in AIP if returned to progress list

Action: Check application status label in AIP

Rule: Rejected then staff edits and adds directly to cart from AIP then removed from cart keeps rejection history and R in AIP
Test Case: TC-06 - Staff edits and adds directly to cart from AIP then removed keeps R in AIP
Preconditions: Application has rejection history and is in Applications in Progress (AIP). Staff edits and adds directly to cart without approval step.
Action: From AIP edit the rejected application and add directly to cart
Expected Result: Application is added to cart through staff edit flow

Action: Remove the application from cart
Open rejection history for the application
Open Applications in Progress (AIP)
Check application status label in AIP
